Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTRule

    @NonNull ImmutableList<Goal>
    apply(Goal goal, RuleApp ruleApp)
    Create a new goal (to be closed in Goal.apply(RuleApp) directly afterwards) with the same sequent as the given one.

    • createApp

      public <T extends ExternalSolverRule> AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp<T> createApp(String successfulSolverName, ImmutableList<PosInOccurrence> unsatCore)
      Create a new rule application with the given solver name and unsat core.
      Specified by:
      createApp in interface ExternalSolverRule
      Parameters:
      successfulSolverName - solver that produced this result
      unsatCore - formulas required to prove the result
      Returns:
      rule application instance

    • createApp

      Specified by:
      createApp in interface BuiltInRule
      Specified by:
      createApp in interface ExternalSolverRule

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pio)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)
      Specified by:
      isApplicable in interface BuiltInRule
      Specified by:
      isApplicable in interface ExternalSolverRule

    • apply

      public @NonNull ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, RuleApp ruleApp)
      Create a new goal (to be closed in Goal.apply(RuleApp) directly afterwards) with the same sequent as the given one.
      Specified by:
      apply in interface BuiltInRule
      Specified by:
      apply in interface RuleExecutor<Goal>
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal on which to apply ruleApp
      ruleApp - the rule application to be executed
      Returns:
      a list with an identical goal as the given goal
